name: meow-lebaran
description: Ucapan Selamat Lebaran bertema kucing dengan AI & Dana Kaget

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='node_modules/iconv-lite/package.json'; if(fs.existsSync(p)){const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p)); delete j.browser; fs.writeFileSync(p, JSON.stringify(j, null, 2));}"
